site.name: BadgerNet 4.0
site.tagline: Where UW–Madison students and alumni go — data-driven views (in progress).

methodology_blurb: This app loads static JSON from /data. Industry supports an optional major filter via /data/majors/. Use the Data catalog tab for per-bundle methodology. Peer outcomes pulls College Scorecard institution fields (or a labeled static fallback without an API key). Research footprint uses OpenAlex institution counts. International may mix sample destinations with IPEDS enrollment context and national IIE Open Doors benchmarks. The Rankings tab loads rankings.json (Wikidata QS/ARWU + IPEDS; sub-tabs inside the view). Replace synthetic career charts with UW surveys and reviewed LinkedIn rollups in production.
